auth: workbench-api is NOT reachable with KC localStorage tokens (KC-tab fetch AND XHR both fail, status 0). Use the ENGAGEMENT tab + monkeypatch-captured headers (Authorization + IDToken + locale + traceparent); injected XHR then works.
notes: REF (Remarks-column) annotations on TB reports. Separate API from FP-API bubble comments; REF values flow NOWHERE else (one-directional mirror is system-lead->TB-report for bubbles/tickmarks only).
columnId is POSITIONAL: Remarks_1 -> 1, Remarks_2 -> 2. RENAME-PROOF (column renamed 'REF' still posts columnId 1). Identify the column by Remarks_{N} id, never header text.
Edit = re-POST (upsert by referenceId+columnId). The upsert is SILENT — check for an existing value and prompt the user first.

PREFLIGHT: tbreportedit GET -> reportFormat.columns must contain a type='Remarks' entry; columns:[] = CCH defaults = NO REF column (native cpComments is NOT a REF column). Add via editReports PATCH (wb_editreports.json).

report_id_resolution.truth: The integer reportId = the report's WPM documentId ('tbreports/{int}' rows). The tbreportedit GET body has NO usable id field — use it only for the Step-0 REF-column preflight.
report_id_resolution.reportGuid_source: report URL path /tbreports/{reportGuid}/... or the tbreports/{clientId} listing

row_id_resolution.method: ag-grid DOM probe — no API call (scripts.leadsheet.tbreport_row_probe_js); scroll row into view first

body.referenceGuid: GUID — Fund rows only; omit for FinancialSubGroup
body.periodId: integer — carries the ENGAGEMENT id (naming gotcha)

response.reportCommentReferenceId: integer — store for DELETE (note: differs from FP-API commentReferenceId)
